positive: A minimalist, highly detailed illustration of a roaring abstract lion's head, stylized with geometric tribal patterns and negative space elements. The lion should appear majestic and powerful, facing forward in a centralized, symmetrical composition. The color palette must be restricted to deep indigo blue, burnt orange, and off-white lines, giving it a strong, high-contrast silhouette suitable for screen printing. Flat graphic design aesthetic, vector art style, perfect symmetry, isolated on a crisp white background. Studio lighting, concept art, ready for textile printing.
